title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. berteroanum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. berteroanum, also known as rockrose or silver-leaved rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, skin protection, and relief from respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Helianthemum nummularium subsp. berteroanum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal teas, ointments, and salves.
